nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown-headed jewel-babbler
nodes.summary: The brown-headed jewel-babbler (Ptilorrhoa geislerorum), also known as the dimorphic jewel-babbler or brown-capped jewel-babbler, is a jewel-babbler in the family Cinclosomatidae. It is now usually considered to be distinct from the blue jewel-babbler, separated altitudinally and by varying behaviour, calls and female plumage. References Del Hoyo, J.; Elliot, A. & Christie D. (editors). (2007). Handbook of the Birds of the World. Volume 12: Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions. ISBN 978-84-96553-42-2

nodes.name: Ptilorrhoa
nodes.summary: Ptilorrhoa（Ptilorrhoa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Spotted jewel-babbler、Blue jewel-babbler、Brown-headed jewel-babbler等4种鸟类。
